cells.text: Combo (2 hits, 2nd hit only); each hit scales separately
cells.html: Combo (2 hits, 2nd hit only); each hit scales separately

cells.text: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active; DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame
cells.html: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active; DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

cells.text: Can get frame advantage with meaty timing and leads to good conversions on counter-hit; decent Drive Rush starter (links to 5HP on hit, frame traps into itself) but doesn't carry much forward momentum; extended hurtbox remains for 4f after active frames
cells.html: Can get frame advantage with meaty timing and leads to good conversions on counter-hit; decent Drive Rush starter (links to 5HP on hit, frame traps into itself) but doesn't carry much forward momentum; extended hurtbox remains for 4f after active frames

cells.text: Great disjointed hitbox; moves Cammy far forward during startup, giving it good range but making it easier to whiff punish; good Drive Rush starter (good momentum, links into 4MP~HK if close enough or frame traps into 5LP/2LP)
cells.html: Great disjointed hitbox; moves Cammy far forward during startup, giving it good range but making it easier to whiff punish; good Drive Rush starter (good momentum, links into 4MP~HK if close enough or frame traps into 5LP/2LP)

cells.text: Good range for 5f punishes and light conversions; extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active; special cancel is delayed until after active frames (prevents OD Spiral Arrow combo); DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame
cells.html: Good range for 5f punishes and light conversions; extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active; special cancel is delayed until after active frames (prevents OD Spiral Arrow combo); DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

cells.text: Great ranged poke, vulnerable to DI if predicted; extended hurtbox remains for 7f after active frames, making it somewhat more whiff punishable
cells.html: Great ranged poke, vulnerable to DI if predicted; extended hurtbox remains for 7f after active frames, making it somewhat more whiff punishable

cells.text: 2f extra recovery on whiff; great ranged poke; Punish Counter knockdown does not lead to follow-up combo, but gives great corner carry; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles; crouch-sized hurtbox on frames 1-28; particularly vulnerable to Drive Impact in neutral; can anti-air some long range jump-ins; has high juggle potential (causes air reset when juggled into)
cells.html: 2f extra recovery on whiff; great ranged poke; Punish Counter knockdown does not lead to follow-up combo, but gives great corner carry; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles; crouch-sized hurtbox on frames 1-28; particularly vulnerable to Drive Impact in neutral; can anti-air some long range jump-ins; has high juggle potential (causes air reset when juggled into)

cells.text: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames
cells.html: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames

cells.text: Good counterpoke and useful combo filler after 2HP or CH 5LP/2LP/5MP; 3f extra recovery on whiff; extends a wide hurtbox during recovery on whiff
cells.html: Good counterpoke and useful combo filler after 2HP or CH 5LP/2LP/5MP; 3f extra recovery on whiff; extends a wide hurtbox during recovery on whiff

cells.text: Forces stand; Good for starting pressure, especially with meaty timing (236HK + Dash 2HP sets gives enough advantage to link 5HP); extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active; situationally useful anti-air
cells.html: Forces stand; Good for starting pressure, especially with meaty timing (236HK + Dash 2HP sets gives enough advantage to link 5HP); extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active; situationally useful anti-air

cells.text: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; low hitconfirm starter; extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active and remains 5f after active
cells.html: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; low hitconfirm starter; extended hurtbox appears for 2f before active and remains 5f after active

cells.text: Great ranged cancelable low poke; very useful when canceled to DR; extended hurtbox appears for 1f before active and remains 6f after active; special/DR cancel is delayed until after active frames; Range: 1.49
cells.html: Great ranged cancelable low poke; very useful when canceled to DR; extended hurtbox appears for 1f before active and remains 6f after active; special/DR cancel is delayed until after active frames; Range: 1.49

cells.text: Disjointed hitbox gives it some neutral utility; has juggle potential (KD +37~39); extended hurtbox remains for 6f after active frames
cells.html: Disjointed hitbox gives it some neutral utility; has juggle potential (KD +37~39); extended hurtbox remains for 6f after active frames

cells.text: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; cancels into j.214K/j.214214P on forward jump only; low blockstun means there will always be a blockstring gap if canceled; lower body projectile invuln 6-28f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; cancels into j.214K/j.214214P on forward jump only; low blockstun means there will always be a blockstring gap if canceled; lower body projectile invuln 6-28f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Causes spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; good hitbox disjoint near Cammy's fists; lower body projectile invuln 8-35f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: Causes spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; good hitbox disjoint near Cammy's fists; lower body projectile invuln 8-35f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Cross-up; can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead (except vs. Blanka)
cells.html: Cross-up; can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead (except vs. Blanka)

cells.text: Long hitbox can work as a ranged air-to-air; lower body projectile invuln 7-30f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: Long hitbox can work as a ranged air-to-air; lower body projectile invuln 7-30f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Good jump-in from long range, especially mixed with empty jump or j.214K to bait anti-airs; can air-to-air from long range; lower body projectile invuln 10-35f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)
cells.html: Good jump-in from long range, especially mixed with empty jump or j.214K to bait anti-airs; can air-to-air from long range; lower body projectile invuln 10-35f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

cells.text: Forces stand (required for 4MP~HK TC); useful anti-air starting on frame 6 but can often trade or whiff against close jumps; extended arm hurtbox on active frames 3-5 is anti-air invulnerable; combos naturally from 5LP/2LP/5MP at close range
cells.html: Forces stand (required for 4MP~HK TC); useful anti-air starting on frame 6 but can often trade or whiff against close jumps; extended arm hurtbox on active frames 3-5 is anti-air invulnerable; combos naturally from 5LP/2LP/5MP at close range

cells.text: Whiffs on crouching opponents; jump cancelable on hit only; puts opponents into limited juggle state on hit (free juggle if started from Drive Rush)
cells.html: Whiffs on crouching opponents; jump cancelable on hit only; puts opponents into limited juggle state on hit (free juggle if started from Drive Rush)

cells.text: 5f extra recovery on whiff/block; pulls back hurtbox on frame 5-14 (auto-shimmy tool); low blockstun means that DR Cancel is the only way to make it safe; extended hurtbox remains for 9f after active frames; special cancel is delayed until after 2nd recovery frame; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames; can juggle into DRC~5HP~HK on normal hit or 214LP on Punish Counter for strong juggle routes
cells.html: 5f extra recovery on whiff/block; pulls back hurtbox on frame 5-14 (auto-shimmy tool); low blockstun means that DR Cancel is the only way to make it safe; extended hurtbox remains for 9f after active frames; special cancel is delayed until after 2nd recovery frame; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames; can juggle into DRC~5HP~HK on normal hit or 214LP on Punish Counter for strong juggle routes

cells.text: Whiffs on crouch blocking opponents (works on crouching hit because 4MP forces stand); jump cancelable on hit only; puts opponent into limited juggle state; has 5f more recovery than 4HK on its own, resulting in more limited juggle follow-ups
cells.html: Whiffs on crouch blocking opponents (works on crouching hit because 4MP forces stand); jump cancelable on hit only; puts opponent into limited juggle state; has 5f more recovery than 4HK on its own, resulting in more limited juggle follow-ups

cells.text: 2 hits; leaves a 9f gap between 1st and 2nd hit on block; 1st hit of HK is cancelable into j.214K (9f gap) or SA2; 2nd hit acts as a cancelable grounded normal; 2nd hit is cancelable into Supers after 5 recovery frames and into specials/DI/DR after 7 recovery frames
cells.html: 2 hits; leaves a 9f gap between 1st and 2nd hit on block; 1st hit of HK is cancelable into j.214K (9f gap) or SA2; 2nd hit acts as a cancelable grounded normal; 2nd hit is cancelable into Supers after 5 recovery frames and into specials/DI/DR after 7 recovery frames

cells.text: Can walk for a manually-timed corner throw loop; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously
cells.html: Can walk for a manually-timed corner throw loop; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

cells.text: No throw oki after corner side switch; can use Drive Rush 5MP (+3 oB, links to 5HP on hit), or Drive Rush 2MP to set up trade combo vs. reversal 4f normals; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously
cells.html: No throw oki after corner side switch; can use Drive Rush 5MP (+3 oB, links to 5HP on hit), or Drive Rush 2MP to set up trade combo vs. reversal 4f normals; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

cells.text: Can get throw oki if opponent is near the corner (no oki midscreen even with Drive Rush)
cells.html: Can get throw oki if opponent is near the corner (no oki midscreen even with Drive Rush)

cells.text: See Drive Impact. Airborne connect gives spinning juggle state on Punish Counter or corner Wall Splat with variable height.
cells.html: See Drive Impact. Airborne connect gives spinning juggle state on Punish Counter or corner Wall Splat with variable height.

cells.text: Performed by inputting 6HPHK during blockstun; 5f extra recovery on hit; freezes the screen for 4f during startup; see Drive Reversal.
cells.html: Performed by inputting 6HPHK during blockstun; 5f extra recovery on hit; freezes the screen for 4f during startup; see Drive Reversal.

cells.text: Performed by holding 6HPHK on wakeup; 5f extra recovery on hit; does not have any screen freeze except for a 12f freeze when interacting with the opponent's throw hitbox (this also refunds 1 Drive bar after punishing the throw); see Drive Reversal.
cells.html: Performed by holding 6HPHK on wakeup; 5f extra recovery on hit; does not have any screen freeze except for a 12f freeze when interacting with the opponent's throw hitbox (this also refunds 1 Drive bar after punishing the throw); see Drive Reversal.

cells.text: See Drive Parry. Perfect Parrying has only 1F of recovery and disables the opponent from canceling their attack. Perfect Parrying projectiles puts you into fixed 11 frames of recovery. After a Perfect Parry, all Super Gauge gain is reduced by 20% and Drive Gauge gain/damage is reduced by 50% for the entire punish combo.
cells.html: See Drive Parry. Perfect Parrying has only 1F of recovery and disables the opponent from canceling their attack. Perfect Parrying projectiles puts you into fixed 11 frames of recovery. After a Perfect Parry, all Super Gauge gain is reduced by 20% and Drive Gauge gain/damage is reduced by 50% for the entire punish combo.

cells.text: See Drive Rush; 1-bar version performed out of a Parry; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation (if performed immediately after a successful Parry, only 1+8 startup); the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties; Distance: 0.603 (min/throw), 2.027 (min/block), 2.796 (max/final DR frame)
cells.html: See Drive Rush; 1-bar version performed out of a Parry; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation (if performed immediately after a successful Parry, only 1+8 startup); the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties; Distance: 0.603 (min/throw), 2.027 (min/block), 2.796 (max/final DR frame)

cells.text: See Drive Rush; 3-bar version performed on hit/block from a cancelable normal; can also be performed on whiff from cancelable light normals; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation; the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties

cells.html: Can be spaced safely; useful in corner juggle routes after 5HP~HK, DR~4HK > 4HK, or blocked Drive Impact

cells.text: Can be spaced safely; best version for buffers in neutral; useful in corner juggle routes into 623K
cells.html: Can be spaced safely; best version for buffers in neutral; useful in corner juggle routes into 623K

cells.text: Only 1st hit is super cancelable (very low damage route); holding HK results in a powered up version
cells.html: Only 1st hit is super cancelable (very low damage route); holding HK results in a powered up version

cells.text: Switches sides on hit; puts opponent into limited juggle state; super cancel comes out on 4th hit; holding HK for 9-15f gives regular 236HK with slower startup; holding 16-17f results in a full charge 2f faster than normal (allows it to combo from CH 5HP or PC 2MP)

cells.text: Long horizontal range (but can drop when canceled from 5HP outside close range); () refers to damage and juggle limit on active frames 5-12 (becomes 1 hit if these frames connect); switches sides on hit; first hit can successfully juggle to SA3; holding HK for 15-16f results in a full charge up to 2f faster (full invuln window shifts 2f earlier, and allows it to combo from CH 2MP); cannot anti-air cross-ups

cells.text: Forward jump only; cancelable from j.MP; button strength affects dive trajectory (LK short, MK mid, HK far); spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; HK version worst-case frame advantage is 1f better than LK/MK versions; 2f extra hitstun and blockstun if it connects on the final 2 active frames before landing (screen shake occurs, guaranteeing an advantage of at least +10/+4)

cells.text: Forward jump only; cancelable from j.MP; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; hitconfirm reaction time is longer the higher the divekick connects (cancelable until landing); frame advantage on hit/block is fixed when connecting on the first active frame (e.g. as a corner throw escape); 2f extra hitstun and blockstun if it connects on the final 2 active frames before landing (screen shake occurs, guaranteeing an advantage of at least +10/+6)

cells.html: Forward jump only; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (no cinematic), number of airborne hits varies based on juggle height; non-cinematic Drive Damage distribution: 900x3-x7,3700; only deals 250 damage on the first hit if it trades

cells.text: Full screen anti-projectile move (can lose to slow projectiles at max range); combos from charged 623[HP], 214P, or 236HK 1st hit when canceled into; cinematic time regenerates ~1.9 Drive bars for Cammy; only deals 500 damage on the first hit if it trades (only the first 5 active frames are invincible)
cells.html: Full screen anti-projectile move (can lose to slow projectiles at max range); combos from charged 623[HP], 214P, or 236HK 1st hit when canceled into; cinematic time regenerates ~1.9 Drive bars for Cammy; only deals 500 damage on the first hit if it trades (only the first 5 active frames are invincible)

cells.text: Full screen anti-projectile move (can lose to slow projectiles at max range); combos from charged 623[HP], 214P, or 236HK 1st hit when canceled into; available at 25% HP or below; cinematic time regenerates ~1.9 Drive bars for Cammy; only deals 500 damage on the first hit if it trades (only the first 5 active frames are invincible)
